content.en:
"What was the situation with that Dao Ancestor-level giant ape just now?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

Ouyang Jiu'er explained: "There is actually a special world fragment here, I took it out from a forbidden place and merged it into the vast sea realm. This world fragment is somewhat special and very secretive, but there are also some powerful creatures born here, the best of which are comparable to the Dao Ancestors of the Six or Seven Heavens. When traveling through the Dark Forbidden Domain, the Dao Ancestor creatures in this world fragment must have suffered a lot of casualties, but there must also be some Dao Ancestor creatures that survived! These Dao Ancestor creatures are born Dao Ancestors, although they have not mastered the Great Dao, but they have very terrifying talents and physical strength. That is, under the suppression of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, otherwise I wouldn't dare to come in!"

Along the way, the two walked neither fast nor slow, and they didn't seem to be in a hurry.

Many creatures attacked them and were slain by them.

But Ouyang Jiu'er kept their corpses and extracted their blood.

"Jiu'er, what is this for?What is the value of the blood of some True Monarch or ordinary True Ancestor level creatures?" Ye Tian wondered.

Ouyang Jiu'er smiled and said: "Don't underestimate these creatures, they are very special, if ordinary creatures without wisdom can become true monarchs and true ancestors, Dao ancestors? For example, you ordinary little geniuses of the human race, a drop of blood is enough to change their qualifications, and their foundation is greatly enhanced! It is of no use to me, but for the human race, this blood is enough to change their fate! Moreover, this blood is only pure energy, and it will not change the blood of the human race. I knew this secret at the beginning, and that's why I took this fragment of this world!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

Soon, he also began to kill the creatures here and collect the blood of these creatures.

Anyway, even if you kill all the creatures here, after a long time, there will still be many creatures born here.

The creatures here are huge, you can imagine how much blood you can have, I don't know how many geniuses can be cultivated, and the value of these bloods alone is an astronomical amount.

Of course, for Ye Tian, this blood could only be used to cultivate the human race, and it was of little value to him.

After a while, another Dao Ancestor creature made a move, wanting to assassinate Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er.

And the realm of this Dao Ancestor creature itself has reached the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, but unfortunately it can only exert a strength comparable to the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and it can't kill Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er at all.

And Ye Tian's strength was comparable to the top-notch Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor combat power, so he could naturally easily block the opponent and injure the opponent.

But Ye Tian didn't chase after him, there was no need for that.

The purpose of their visit was to take the treasury, not to destroy all the creatures in this fragment of the world.

A few days later.

Ye Tian had collected enough blood before he stopped collecting it and followed Ouyang Jiu'er to a palace in the center of the World Fragment.

The prohibition outside this palace was very complex and powerful, and even Ye Tian couldn't understand it.

Suddenly.

Ouyang Jiu'er said: "Brother Ye, there is actually one thing I have been lying to you, in fact, I was not an ordinary Dao Ancestor in my previous life, but a half-step domain ancestor!"

"I know!"

Ye Tian was not surprised at all.

"Eh, you know?" Ouyang Jiu'er's eyes widened, "How do you know that I am the reincarnation of a half-step domain ancestor?"

Ye Tian smiled and said, "I'm not stupid, can an ordinary Dao Ancestor be so omniscient by you? And you also said before, you brought back this world fragment from a forbidden area, there are six or seven Heavenly Dao Ancestor creatures here, ordinary Dao Ancestor doesn't have this ability! Guess a little more, the strength of your previous life was either an invincible True Ancestor or a half-step Domain Ancestor!"

"That's right!"

Ouyang Jiu'er nodded, she usually had a lot of loopholes, and she knew that there was a problem if she thought about it carefully.

"Then why don't you demolish me?"

Ouyang Jiu'er asked.

"I'm afraid of you, you're a half-step domain ancestor!" Ye Tian joked.

Ouyang Jiu'er glanced at Ye Tian, but she knew that Ye Tian didn't care about her identity, what about the half-step domain ancestor, it was also a previous life.

Moreover, Ye Tian is already a supreme true ancestor, and he will at least be able to become an invincible true ancestor in the future, and the chance of becoming a half-step domain ancestor is also very high.

So, her identity is nothing to be proud of.

"Brother Ye, in fact, we didn't know each other well at the beginning, so naturally it is impossible to reveal my true identity to you. In addition, it is not convenient for me to tell you about my previous life now, and if some things are said, the impact will be too great. Later, I'll tell you!" Ouyang Jiu'er explained.

"It's okay, I also know that there are some things that are not beneficial, but will bring trouble to yourself!" Ye Tian said in understanding.

"I'll open this palace first!"

Ouyang Jiu'er made a move, and soon opened the ban on the palace, and the two walked in, and the ban was closed again, which was also to prevent those Dao Ancestor creatures from entering this palace.

Although the wisdom of those Dao Ancestor creatures is not high, they also know that this palace is a good thing.

It's a pity that they can't break the ban on this palace.

After all, this was the prohibition that Ouyang Jiu'er had personally arranged when he was a half-step domain ancestor in his previous life, how could those five or six Heavenly Dao Ancestors be able to break it?

Inside the palace.

Ye Tian saw all kinds of treasures, which were just used for decoration, which showed how rich Ouyang Jiu'er was at the beginning.

In addition, the palace leads to a treasure trove, each of which houses a different kind of treasure.

Ouyang Jiu'er took Ye Tian to a treasure house and opened the door of the treasure house.

There are not many things in this treasure house, but each one is very precious, and Ye Tian has also seen a lot of forbidden strange things and a forbidden treasure.

That forbidden treasure is a bead that exudes terrible taboo rules.

"This bead, I call it a war bead, its function is to assist in battle! We, the true ancestors who have mastered the power of the dark taboo, actually do not mobilize much of the forbidden power. And this battle bead can store the power of the dark taboo, once it is in battle, it can not be limited to the mobilization of the power of the dark taboo, and the combat effectiveness will be much improved. Moreover, it can also absorb the enemy's dark forbidden power, although it can't absorb all of it, but if it can absorb a part, it is enough to weaken the enemy's attack!

Ouyang Jiu'er explained.

"Such a forbidden treasure against the sky!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

If he fought with Ouyang Jiu'er who was holding a war bead, wouldn't he be suppressed by Ouyang Jiu'er?

Of course, when the strength gap reaches a certain level, even if there is a forbidden treasure like a war bead to assist, it is useless.

This battle bead was naturally not for Ye Tian, but Ouyang Jiu'er introduced it to Ye Tian.

Then, Ouyang Jiu'er introduced a lot of good things, each of which made people greedy.

But Ye Tian didn't have any ideas, maybe he had seen too many good things, so he calmed down.

But until Ouyang Jiu'er took out a treasure, he was not calm at all.

It was a fragment of a broken stone tablet, all of which were taboo rules, and there were some taboo words, which were the first time he had seen them.

"This stele is something I once brought out in the Dark Forbidden Realm, in a special place, nine deaths, it's a pity that it is of little use to me, but it is very important to you!"

Ouyang Jiu'er pointed to the broken stone tablet.

"What is this?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"This should be a fragment of a top-level forbidden treasure born in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and its use should be to record the rules of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and some forbidden words were naturally born on it. Each word of these taboo words contains a different mystery, and it can even be said that it represents a kind of taboo avenue. Brother Ye, you are not walking a simple avenue, but a new avenue after the fusion of countless avenues. It is very difficult to take such a path, I have seen many peerless geniuses take such a path, but they fail one by one, and in the end they can only choose one avenue. For example, you have now comprehended the Dao of the Strongest Sword, the Dao of the Dao of the Dao, and the Dao of the Dao of Life, but this is only a very small part of the Dao you have cultivated, so how difficult is it for you to realize your own Dao of the Dao?"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

Ye Tian didn't refute, that's right, what he walked was the Endless Dao, but it was too difficult to comprehend the Supreme Endless Dao, how long would it take for a door to comprehend the Extremely Powerful Dao?

At this time, Ouyang Jiu'er said again: "This stone tablet can help you, what is recorded on it is the Forbidden Dao, and it is actually the most fundamental Origin Dao. You can completely comprehend the countless forbidden paths above, merge the forbidden paths with your great paths, and at this point, you will use the forbidden paths as the foundation to realize the supreme forbidden paths that belong to you! In this way, it will be much easier, and you don't need to comprehend the supreme paths one by one! In fact, the supreme powerful paths will still develop towards the forbidden paths in the future, so you can skip this step, and there is no need to dwell on the powerful paths!"

"Those who have only been the Strongest Dao Ancestor for the rest of their lives will be entangled in the Powerful Dao! To a Supreme True Ancestor like you, there is no need to dwell on this, and there is no need to waste time in order to comprehend a large number of Supreme Powerful Dao! The Forbidden Dao is the foundation of everything, and it is also the ultimate direction, even the Domain Ancestor has to comprehend the Forbidden Dao! This broken stone tablet contains many forbidden Dao, almost all-encompassing, but the Forbidden Dao contained on it is too weak, and it is only suitable for beginners. So, it's for you, but it's useless for me!"

After Ouyang Jiu'er finished introducing, Ye Tian's eyes stared at this broken stone tablet, and his heart was very shaken.

He put away the broken stone tablet and thanked him: "Jiu'er, thank you!"

He knew very well that the value of this broken stone tablet far exceeded that of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart, even if the value of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart was high, it was of little use to the Invincible True Ancestor, but this stone tablet was useful to the Invincible True Ancestor.

Moreover, this was brought back from the Dark Forbidden Domain by Ouyang Jiu'er at a huge price for the Half-Step Domain Ancestor, so you can imagine how high its value is.
